title: Context Selection, Compression, Deduplication, and Position · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent team receives a different corpus, query mix, relevance policy, language set, access model, latency budget, harm profile, and evidence duty and transfers context selection, compression, deduplication, and position into a new citation-mapped context assembler. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of citation-mapped context assembler with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Allocate tokens across instructions, query, history, evidence, citation metadata, answer, and safety reserves before assembly.
Collapse duplicate and overlapping chunks while retaining source diversity, conflicting versions, amendments, and dissent evidence.
Compare extractive selection, sentence filtering, summaries, and structured compression against retained claim and citation evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Rag Context Token Budget
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab RAG engineering team handles case 8285 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to deduplicate, compress, order, and citation-map context within a measured token budget; keep every status keyboard reachable, announced, readable without color, and linked to structured source evidence; then insert an untrusted instruction into a relevant document and prove it remains data. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

steps.title: RAG and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Rag Context Citation Map
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-context-citation-map-hk2vfh" that uses case 9594 to deduplicate, compress, order, and citation-map context within a measured token budget. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-context-citation-map-hk2vfh
# Competency: rag-context-citation-map.
# Case 9594: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def evidence_rag_context_citation_map_hk2vfh(candidate_tokens: int = 6400, context_budget: int = 2200, selected_tokens: int = 1800, duplicate_chunks: int = 1, citation_links: int = 6, order_tested: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_hk2vfh = "hk2vfh-hfv2kh-9594"
    assert evidence_variant_hk2vfh
    evidence_axes_hk2vfh = (
        "corpushk2vfh",
        "queryhfv2kh",
        "tenant9594",
        "indexhk2vfh9594",
        "prompthfv2kh9594",
        "evaluation9594hk2vfh",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_hk2vfh)) == 6
    if min(candidate_tokens, context_budget, selected_tokens) < 0:
        return False, selected_tokens, "token-accounting"
    if selected_tokens > context_budget or context_budget > candidate_tokens:
        return False, selected_tokens, "context-budget"
    if duplicate_chunks < 0 or citation_links < 1:
        return False, citation_links, "context-identity"
    if not order_tested:
        return False, citation_links, "position-bias"
    retained = selected_tokens - duplicate_chunks * 100
    assert retained >= 0
    return True, retained, "citation-mapped-context"
